BulkDetails.Name: Structural Steel
BulkDetails.Description: Fatigue Data at zero mean stress comes from 1998 ASME BPV Code, Section 8, Div 2, Table 5-110.1

BulkDetails.Name: Aluminum Alloy
BulkDetails.Description: General aluminum alloy. Fatigue properties come from MIL-HDBK-5H, page 3-277.

ParameterDetails.Name: Coefficient of Thermal Expansion X direction
Coefficient of Thermal Expansion Y direction
Coefficient of Thermal Expansion Z direction
